intro_summary: Casper is a sweet puppy looking for a family who can help him build confidence and grow up to be the brave little man we know he can be! He shares his kennel with another PACC pup and would likely benefit from a confident furry friend to show him the ropes in a new home. Casper has made significant progress at the shelter and is ready to find his forever home.

intro_summary: Gretchen is a 69-pound lap dog who loves to snuggle and is very affectionate. She enjoys being close to her humans and has a playful personality. Gretchen is currently working on her excitement around other dogs and would do best as the only dog in the home. She is a loyal companion who enjoys relaxing on the couch with her favorite humans.

intro_summary: Baloo is a 5-year-old mixed breed male weighing 73 lbs. He is a well-trained dog who is full of love and enjoys playtime, especially tug of war. Baloo can be hesitant when meeting new people but loves attention with proper introductions. He is fully potty-trained and crate-trained, and he walks nicely on a leash. Baloo is looking for a confident adopter to help him build his confidence with new people.
